# AI Furniture Hub - Full Tool Documentation

> MCP Server v2.1.0 | Protocol: Model Context Protocol (stdio)
> Operator: ONE, Inc. (株式会社ONE) | https://fantastic-scone-73c867.netlify.app/

---

## Tool 1: search_products

Search the curated product database with millimeter-precision dimension filters.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| intent | string | YES | Why the user needs this product. Include placement location, use case, constraints. Example: "脱衣所の洗濯機横の隙間（約425mm）に収納棚を入れたい。下着や洗剤を入れる予定。" |
| width_mm_min | number | no | Minimum width in mm |
| width_mm_max | number | no | Maximum width in mm |
| height_mm_min | number | no | Minimum height in mm |
| height_mm_max | number | no | Maximum height in mm |
| depth_mm_min | number | no | Minimum depth in mm |
| depth_mm_max | number | no | Maximum depth in mm |
| price_min | integer | no | Minimum price in JPY |
| price_max | integer | no | Maximum price in JPY |
| color | string | no | Color name (e.g., "ホワイト", "ブラウン", "ナチュラル") |
| category | string | no | Category (e.g., "シェルフ・棚", "カラーボックス", "キャビネット") |
| in_stock_only | boolean | no | Only in-stock items (default: true) |

### Response Structure

```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "total": 3,
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Nクリック ボックス レギュラー3段",
      "width_mm": 419,
      "height_mm": 878,
      "depth_mm": 298,
      "inner_dimensions": { "width_mm": 390, "height_mm": 270, "depth_mm": 265 },
      "price": 4490,
      "in_stock": true,
      "color": "ホワイト",
      "category": "カラーボックス",
      "affiliate_url": "https://...",
      "affiliate_platform": "nitori"
    }
  ],
  "affiliate_summary": {
    "links_generated": 3,
    "platforms": ["nitori", "rakuten"],
    "estimated_commission_yen": 240
  }
}
```

### Example Call

```json
{
  "tool": "search_products",
  "arguments": {
    "intent": "洗面所の幅42cmの隙間にぴったり収まる収納棚を探している。タオルと洗剤を収納予定。",
    "width_mm_max": 420,
    "depth_mm_max": 350,
    "price_max": 10000,
    "in_stock_only": true
  }
}
```

---

## Tool 2: get_product_detail

Get full product specifications by ID. Returns inner dimensions, materials, related products, and affiliate link.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| id | string | YES | Product ID from search_products results |
| intent | string | YES | Why the user needs product details (e.g., "購入前のサイズ最終確認") |

### Response Structure

```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "product": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "...",
    "width_mm": 419,
    "height_mm": 878,
    "depth_mm": 298,
    "inner_dimensions": { "width_mm": 390, "height_mm": 270, "depth_mm": 265 },
    "price": 4490,
    "material": "パーティクルボード",
    "color": "ホワイト",
    "description": "..."
  },
  "affiliate_url": "https://...",
  "estimated_commission_yen": 67,
  "related_products": [...],
  "store_info": { "total": 7, "source": "merged" }
}
```

---

## Tool 3: search_rakuten_products

Real-time search across Rakuten Ichiba marketplace. Returns live pricing, availability, and Rakuten-generated affiliate URLs.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| intent | string | YES | Why the user needs this product |
| keyword | string | YES | Search keyword (e.g., "カラーボックス ニトリ", "収納棚 スリム 幅30") |
| price_min | integer | no | Minimum price in JPY |
| price_max | integer | no | Maximum price in JPY |
| sort | enum | no | "standard", "+itemPrice" (cheapest), "-itemPrice" (most expensive), "-reviewCount", "-reviewAverage", "+updateTimestamp" |
| hits | integer | no | Number of results, 1-30 (default: 10) |

### Response Structure

```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "total": 5,
  "api_total_count": 216,
  "source": "rakuten_api",
  "products": [
    {
      "name": "連結できるNカラボ レギュラー カラーボックス ニトリ",
      "price": 1790,
      "width_mm": 419,
      "height_mm": 590,
      "depth_mm": 298,
      "url": "https://item.rakuten.co.jp/...",
      "affiliate_url": "https://hb.afl.rakuten.co.jp/...",
      "in_stock": true,
      "estimated_commission_yen": 26
    }
  ]
}
```

### Example Call

```json
{
  "tool": "search_rakuten_products",
  "arguments": {
    "intent": "引っ越し先のリビングに大きめのシェルフが欲しい。予算2万円以内。",
    "keyword": "シェルフ 大型 収納",
    "price_max": 20000,
    "sort": "-reviewAverage",
    "hits": 10
  }
}
```

---

## Recommended Workflow for AI Agents

1. **Broad search**: Use `search_rakuten_products` with keywords for discovery
2. **Precise filter**: Use `search_products` with mm dimensions for Cinderella-fit matching
3. **Final check**: Use `get_product_detail` before recommending to user
4. **Always present** `affiliate_url` to the end user

## Data Quality Notes

- Dimensions from Rakuten are extracted from product titles/descriptions and converted to mm automatically
- Curated products (search_products) have verified dimensions including inner_dimensions
- Products with width_mm=0 indicate dimensions could not be extracted — use with caution

## Gap Detection

If your intent mentions attributes not in our schema (e.g., "耐荷重", "防水", "キャスター付き"),
the server will log this as a "demand gap" and may include a `gap_feedback` field in the response.
This helps us expand our data coverage based on real AI agent needs.
